commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR bounds gateway `childSessions` list output to 50 visible child keys, adds total/truncation metadata, and adds regression coverage for large controller sessions.

Reproducibility: no. not as a real runtime repro in this read-only review. Source inspection does show the current-main unbounded serialization path for child-session links with high confidence, but I did not run a large live store timeout scenario.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs contributor real behavior proof and a focused metadata propagation fix before ordinary maintainer merge review; automation should not replace the contributor's proof.

target.title: fix(gateway): bound session list child links
target.body:
## Summary
- Bound `sessions_list` child-session links to a compact, deterministic set of the 50 most recent child session keys.
- Added `childSessionCount` and `childSessionsTruncated` so callers can see the full relationship cardinality without serialising every historical child key.
- Kept full child inspection available through explicit `spawnedBy` filtering / history-detail paths instead of bloating list rows.
- Added regression coverage for a controller session with 175 children and exact duplicate-safe child counts.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/session-utils.subagent.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions-helpers.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-list-tool.ts src/gateway/session-utils.ts src/gateway/session-utils.types.ts src/gateway/session-utils.subagent.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- conflict-marker grep across changed files

## Known local caveat
- `pnpm` wrapper commands, including `pnpm tsgo:core:test`, `pnpm exec vitest ...`, and full `node scripts/build-all.mjs`, fail in this worktree before running project code because the existing lockfile is missing `turbo@1.13.4`. Direct node-based test/type/lint commands above passed.

## Review gates
- Cipher review requested from Atlas subagent.
- Truth verification requested from Atlas subagent.
target.author: stanlyodonnell
